name: testCancelButtonInChangeMerchantAcquirerActivityDialog
description: Verify that click on Cancel button cancels the Merchant Acquirer status change
descriptionHtml: Verify that click on Cancel button cancels the Merchant Acquirer status change

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that click on Cancel button cancels the Merchant Acquirer status change

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select 'Merchant 1 for C112172' business unit using filter
Select '0712.100838 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Type '0712.100838 acquirer for gateway' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0712.100838 acquirer for gateway' in dropdown
Click on Change merchant acquirer activity button
Verify that acquirer status is still 'Active'
